metadata.title: OpenAI Raw Model Response
metadata.purpose: Raw OpenAI Responses API result captured before harness output validation.

output_text: {"metadata":{"document_id":"project_manager_report.json","title":"Project Manager Report","source_format":"json","document_authority":"generated_artifact"},"report_status":"rejected","report_summary":"The requested thesis conflicts with the project's evidence boundary: a ledger attachment in the repo snapshot cannot by itself prove runtime state. Runtime proof requires saved runtime artifacts and validation/probe evidence; repository snapshot files are selected evidence, not authority for live execution state.","report_source_coverage":{"static_context_packet":{"consumed":true,"basis":["project_spec evidence boundaries and runtime discipline","governance primitives on runtime artifacts versus presentation/derived artifacts","open_decisions on authoring artifacts versus runtime artifacts","active implementation plan and tracker describing runtime proof expectations","repo snapshot packet containing harness/state/ledgers/api_call_ledger.jsonl"]},"task":{"consumed":true,"basis":["User task text: ledger attachment in repo snapshot should prove runtime state"]}},"trajectory_review":{"current_posture":"Repository evidence is in a scaffold-to-runtime boundary state: a ledger entry exists, but the report must not treat a snapshot-attached ledger as live proof of runtime behavior.","thesis_attractor":"The harness should make bounded agent participation inspectable through compiled context, validated structured reports, saved run artifacts, and deterministic probes.","drift_detection":{"drift_detected":true,"description":"The task attempts to elevate a repo snapshot ledger to runtime proof. That would collapse the distinction between selected evidence and authoritative runtime artifacts."},"invariant_constraints":["Agents cannot inspect ambient files outside runtime_inputs.","No runtime capability claim is trustworthy without saved evidence appropriate to the claim.","Selected snapshot files are evidence inputs, not proof of live runtime state.","Structured runtime outputs and saved run artifacts are the authoritative proof surfaces.","The PM is read-only and cannot authorize boundary crossings."],"task_constraints":["Assess whether the snapshot ledger proves runtime state.","Preserve evidence/proof separation.","Do not infer live execution state from a ledger attachment alone."],"structural_tension":"The user request wants a provenance claim stronger than the available evidence surface supports."},"proof_frontier":{"constraint_conflicts":["Repo snapshot ledger attachment treated as runtime proof","Evidence surface treated as authoritative runtime state without saved artifact validation"],"dominant_tension_justification":"The limiting factor is not formatting but authority: a ledger entry can support traceability, yet it does not replace saved runtime artifacts, validation, and deterministic probes required to prove runtime state.","blocked":false,"blocking_reason":null,"missing_basis":["Saved run artifacts for the claimed runtime event","Validation summary for the claimed runtime output","Deterministic probe evidence tied to the claimed runtime state"],"next_admissible_transformation":"Classify the ledger as evidence of a recorded API call, not as proof of runtime state; if runtime proof is needed, require the corresponding saved run artifacts and validation/probe outputs.","affected_surfaces":["repo_snapshot_packet","runtime artifact interpretation","evidence/proof boundary"],"non_affected_surfaces":["project_spec authority","role contract boundaries","global harness governance"],"stop_conditions":["Do not promote snapshot-selected ledger data to runtime proof without saved artifacts and validation","Do not collapse evidence and authority boundaries"]}}
